channel.title: Ewwii Articles
channel.description: Fresh technical updates, configuration guides, and articles.

item.title: Introducing Jscore
item.description: Introducing Jscore, a JavaScript plugin for ewwii.

item.title: Origins of Ewwii
item.description: Exploring early days of ewwii, why it was created, and early design choices.

item.title: Ewwii v0.7.0: Migration guide to Nbcl and problems with Rhai
item.description: Ewwii v0.7.0 makes nbcl the default configuration language. This simplifies the process of configuration and allows more flexible growth for the tool.

item.title: Ewwii v0.5.0: Overview & Migration guide
item.description: A full explanation of what changes have occoured.

item.title: Ewwii v0.3.0: Introduction of GTK4
item.description: A full explanation of what changes have occoured.

item.title: What is ewwii?
item.description: An explanation on what ewwii is and is not.
